title: +$3.8k in one day trading SPY… and I not sure I deserved it
author: Fast-Swimming3254
selftext:
Had one of my best days today (+$3.8k, \~5%) mostly trading SPY options

The market didnt feel that crazy but I caught a couple intraday moves that worked out really well

I still pretty new to this so I honestly cant tell if this was good execution or just lucky lining up

Curious how more experienced traders would view a day like this what should I be paying attention to so I dont give it all back?

Appreciate any feedback 🙏
